services.title: What I do
services.description: I turn ideas into complete digital products, from planning to delivery.

items.title: Web Applications
items.description: Modern and responsive interfaces with React, Next.js, and TailwindCSS, optimized for performance and SEO.

items.title: Mobile Applications
items.description: Cross-platform native apps with React Native, focused on user experience and performance.

items.title: APIs and Backend
items.description: Robust and scalable APIs with Java/Spring Boot and Node.js/NestJS, with clean architecture and best practices.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.description: Architecture analysis, code review, and mentoring for teams seeking quality and scalability.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Some of the projects I have developed throughout my professional journey.

hero.paragraph1: João Paulo Almeida Alavarse is a fullstack developer, passionate about technology, software architecture, and transforming ideas into real, scalable, and well-built products.
hero.paragraph2: When developing software, I always think about the client and what could help them. Sometimes it might be something simple, or even "boring" to program, but these small details are what make the user's life easier and keep the client engaged with the product.

story.title: My story
story.paragraph1: My journey in technology began during my undergraduate studies, when I realized that programming was much more than writing code — it was about solving real problems.
story.paragraph2: Also, through the influence of great professors I had, I developed the desire to contribute to the next generation of developers. That is how I also started working as a higher education professor.
story.paragraph3: Today, I work with complete digital products, taking care of frontend, backend, and architecture decisions.

items.question: What technologies do you use?
items.answer: I mainly work with React, Next.js, React Native, Java with Spring Boot, Node.js with NestJS, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS.

items.question: Are you available for freelance work?
items.answer: Yes! I am open to freelance projects and partnerships. Get in touch so we can discuss your project.

items.question: What is your work process?
items.answer: I start by understanding the problem and requirements, define the architecture, develop iteratively, and deliver with documentation and tests.

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.description: If you have an idea or need someone to turn your project into reality, I can help you from planning to deployment.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

hero.name: João Paulo Almeida Alavarse
hero.description: Full Stack Developer, startup founder, and university professor. I build digital products from zero to deploy — from complete e-commerce platforms to healthcare apps — with React, React Native, Java, and Spring Boot.
hero.imageAlt: Photo of João Paulo Almeida Alavarse
